summary: Completed Phase 6 & 7 testing for Tinkú. All core features working: parent login, student login, islas page, Mis Logros page with earned/locked badges, PWA manifest/sw.js/icons, cron anonymize endpoint, audit logging. CelebrationModal component exists with correct structure but couldn't trigger mastery celebration in E2E due to exercise pool limitation (all answers marked as correct_retry). Resend email integration working - tries Resend API first, falls back to stub on sandbox restriction.
critical_code_review_comments: CelebrationModal E2E testing limitation: The mastery celebration only triggers on correct_first answers (first attempt on a specific exercise). With a small exercise pool, repeated testing causes all answers to be marked as correct_retry, preventing the celebration from appearing. Consider adding more exercises or a test mode that bypasses the retry check.
Resend sandbox limitation: Emails to non-verified addresses (like test@example.com) fail with 403. The code correctly falls back to stub logging. For production, a verified domain is needed.
seed_data_creation: Used existing student Mateo E. with code 74RTPM. Attempted to seed mastery near threshold but exercise retry logic prevented celebration trigger.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 6 & 7 features tested. CelebrationModal component verified via code review - has all required data-testids, 1.5s gate, sound toggle with localStorage persistence. To trigger mastery celebration in E2E, need fresh exercises (not previously answered by the student).

Dashboard shows Mateo E. with XP and code 74RTPM ✅
Student login: /entrar with code 74RTPM → /islas ✅
Islas page: greeting '¡Hola, Mateo E.!' with XP display ✅

Mis Logros page: 'Ganaste 2 de 5 medallas' counter ✅
Mis Logros page: 'Primer paso' badge in Ganadas section ✅

Audit logging: data_access_log has rows with access_target='auth.anonymous_signin' for student login ✅
Audit logging: data_access_log has rows with access_target='attempts.submit' for exercise submissions ✅
Resend email: Integration tries Resend API, falls back to stub on sandbox restriction ✅
localStorage tinku-sound key works correctly for sound preference ✅
CelebrationModal component structure verified via code review ✅
tests_not_fully_verified: CelebrationModal full E2E flow: Could not trigger mastery celebration due to exercise retry logic. Component exists with correct structure (data-testid='celebration-modal', data-variant, celebration-sound-toggle, celebration-close, celebration-title, celebration-xp, 1.5s gate). Audit logs show mastery WAS triggered earlier (mastered:true, badges_awarded:['concept_mastered'] at 18:58:56).

notes.celebration_modal: The CelebrationModal component is correctly implemented with all required features: confetti (canvas-confetti), sound (Web Audio API), 1.5s gate (MIN_DURATION_MS=1500), sound toggle with localStorage persistence ('tinku-sound' key), close button shows 'Uff, qué emoción…' when disabled and CTA label when enabled. The audit logs confirm mastery celebration DID trigger at 18:58:56 with correct_first outcome.
notes.resend_email: Resend API key is configured. Emails to non-verified addresses fail with 403 (sandbox restriction). Code correctly falls back to stub logging. For production, need verified domain.
notes.audit_logging: logDataAccess helper working correctly. Logs include student_login (auth.anonymous_signin), attempts.submit with full metadata (xp, outcome, mastered, badges_awarded).
